Pongz App – Account Deletion Guide
If you no longer wish to use Pongz, you can permanently delete your account by following the steps
below. Please note that this action is irreversible.
Step 1: Open the Pongz app on your device and log in with your existing account
credentials.
Step 2: Once the home screen has loaded, tap on the Settings icon located in the
top-right corner.
Step 3: In the Settings panel, you will see four tabs:
- Sound
- Display
- Account
- Support
Tap on Account.
Step 4: Under the Account tab, you will find a Delete button. Tap on it.
Step 5: Your account will be permanently deleted from Pongz. After deletion, you
will be redirected to the login page.
■■ Note: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data and progress will be
erased once the account is deleted.
